generatedBy: slice-5 oracle — find/replace semantics + Mac UI
method: Codex computer-use drove Word; semantic counts obtained via Word's AppleScript find OBJECT (Word's own find engine = authoritative); the built-in Find DIALOG crashed/recovered Word, so dialog screenshots are the document surface, not the expanded dialogs (composition partly user/observed). Probe text: 'Needle needle NEEDLE cat category scatter cat bat bet bit boot brat'. Evidence: .oracle-probes/slice5/ (results.md + shots/, gitignored).

wildcardCaseInteraction.observed: with Match wildcards ON and Match case set FALSE, 'NEEDLE' matched only NEEDLE and 'needle' matched only needle — wildcard search is ALWAYS case-sensitive regardless of Match case
wildcardCaseInteraction.engineBefore: wildcard regex built 'gi' (case-insensitive) when Match case off
wildcardCaseInteraction.fix: commit 1186532: wildcard regex forced 'g' (case-sensitive) in both setSearchSession and the invalidator; find pane greys 'Match case' when 'Use wildcards' is on; new [5] test locks it

replaceAll_wholeWordOn.result: Needle needle NEEDLE DOG category scatter DOG bat bet bit boot brat

singleReplaceAdvance.observed: object-model Replace One replaced the first match but did NOT advance/select the next (object-model path). Word's GUI Replace advances; our engine's replaceOne re-runs the session and advances ([5] 'Replace replaces the active match and advances' passes)
singleReplaceAdvance.verdict: PASS (our GUI behavior matches Word GUI; object-model non-advance is an OM artifact, not a deviation)

selectionScope.observed: Word Replace-All scoped to a selection replaced ONLY within the selection (object-model). Our engine replaceAll replaces ALL session matches in the whole document
selectionScope.verdict: DEVIATION — RECORDED (selection-scoped Replace All deferred; whole-doc only this slice)

uiComposition.cmdF: Mac Word 16.77 ⌘F = a top-right 'Search in Document' TOOLBAR field (search field + magnifier + prev/next + clear token), NOT a left Navigation sidebar; no 'N of M' textual count observed. Our PM find pane is the preserved sidebar taskpane chrome (UI-fidelity constraint: chrome stays). DEVIATION — RECORDED (cosmetic; chrome preserved).
uiComposition.advancedDialog: Find and Replace modal has tabs Find / Replace / Go To; 'Find what'; 'Highlight all items found in' + Main Document popup; buttons Find All / Cancel / Find Next. Search Options (per Word find properties): Match case, Find whole words only, Use wildcards, Sounds like, Find all word forms. prefix/suffix/ignore-punct/ignore-whitespace NOT observed (dialog crashed before full expand).
uiComposition.goTo: Go To tab targets NOT captured (dialog crashed). Our D.goToDialog offers Heading/Bookmark/Page/Line (Heading works on the model; Page/Line pagination-gated → Phase 7). Full Word Go-To target list UNVERIFIED this run — recorded follow-up.

XML-level check (unzip document.xml): QUX×3, bar×2, foo×0; markup-leak scan ProseMirror-search-match/active-search-match/find-hit/search-match/decoration ALL 0 — decorations are view-only and never serialize.

verdict: Find/replace SEMANTICS validated against Word 16.77.1 — all PASS; one deviation (wildcard case) found and FIXED.
